settings_item_cors_enabled_desc: Controls whether AsterDrive actively processes cross-origin browser requests. When disabled, the server skips all CORS headers and enforcement.
settings_item_cors_allowed_origins_desc: List the browser origins that may access AsterDrive cross-origin, separated by commas. Empty means the server returns no CORS headers and the browser blocks cross-origin access naturally. "*" allows any origin.
settings_item_cors_allow_credentials_des: Controls whether CORS responses include Access-Control-Allow-Credentials. Do not combine this with an allowed-origins value of "*".
settings_item_cors_max_age_secs_desc: Controls how long browsers keep CORS preflight results cached before they need to re-check.
settings_item_public_site_url_desc: Set the public HTTP(S) origins that external users actually use to reach this site, one origin per field, for example https://drive.example.com and https://panel.example.com. They are used to build absolute links for share pages, Office previews, WebDAV, and callbacks; the first origin is the fallback. Leave the list empty to fall back to the current request origin.
site_url_mismatch_title: Current site URL does not match the system config
site_url_mismatch_description: The current browser address is {{current}}, but the configured public site URL list does not include it (current config: {{configured}}). Update it now so share links, Office previews, WebDAV endpoints, and future callbacks use the current address?
